title: America's Aluminum Supply Hits Zero in 30 Days
summary: The United States faces a severe aluminum supply crisis, with Bloomberg warning that supplies could hit zero within 30 days due to a 50% tariff on Canadian aluminum. This tariff, intended to protect domestic production, has triggered disruptions threatening the manufacturing base. Middle East production issues have eliminated major foreign sources, potentially widening the deficit to 1.5 million tons.

title: It's not just oil — the Iran war is disrupting helium and aluminum shortage impact
summary: The Iran war disrupts global aluminum supply alongside energy markets, affecting materials for semiconductors, medical equipment, and consumer goods. Qatar halted helium production after Iranian strikes on LNG facilities, while regional disruptions reduce aluminum availability and raise production costs due to higher energy prices. This is tightening market conditions and driving aluminum prices higher.

title: Rio Tinto's Nuton technology produces first copper
summary: Rio Tinto has produced the first copper cathode using its proprietary Nuton bioleaching technology at Gunnison Copper’s Johnson Camp mine after over 30 years of research. The technology relies on microorganisms grown on site and anticipates a mine-to-metal carbon footprint of 0.82 kg CO₂-e per kg copper, the lowest in the U.S. The deployment targets production of approximately 30,000 tonnes of refined copper over a four-year demonstration period.

title: Rewiring a sustainable, clean energy future with copper
summary: The copper industry's focus on recycling, resource efficiency, and technological innovation ensures copper remains a sustainable enabler of the energy transition. Copper's ability to efficiently transmit electricity is vital for minimizing energy losses in rewiring for a net-zero future. It is crucial for advanced technologies like mobile phones, electric vehicles, and digital infrastructure.

title: Rewiring a sustainable, clean energy future with copper
summary: As the world rewires for a net-zero future, copper's efficient electricity transmission minimizes energy losses and supports clean energy technologies. title: Live Nickel Prices Today
summary: Nickel edged up 0.19% to $19,127.31/Ton globally and ¥130,526/Ton in China. title: Green nickel for sustainable electrification
summary: Researchers at the Max Planck Institute for Sustainable Materials have developed a carbon-free, energy-saving method for nickel extraction using hydrogen plasma from low-grade ores. This one-step process cuts CO2 emissions by 84 percent and is up to 18 percent more energy-efficient with renewable electricity and green hydrogen. The innovation addresses rising nickel demand for electrification while reducing environmental impact and enabling use of previously overlooked ores.
